◎译　　名　艾曼纽的复仇 / Blood Vengeance / Emanuelle e Françoise le sorelline
◎片　　名　Emanuelle's Revenge
◎年　　代　1975

◎主　　演　帕特丽齐娅·高里 Patrizia Gori
　　　　　  罗斯玛丽·琳特 Rosemarie Lindt
　　　　　  卢西亚诺·罗西 Luciano Rossi

　　　　　  安妮·卡罗尔·埃德尔 Annie Carol Edel


◎简　　介  

　　” Emanuelle (Lindt) is out to avenge her sister (Gori), who committed suicide after escaping from her sadistic lover Carlo (Eastman). So she chains him up in her basement, drugs him, and forces him to watch her having sex.“
